description.en: Complete guide to structural steel connections. Learn about bolted moment connections, braced frame connections, and design requirements for steel structures.
description.zh: 钢结构连接完整指南。了解螺栓刚接、支撑框架连接和钢结构设计要求。
description.es: Guía completa de conexiones de acero estructural. Aprenda sobre conexiones de momento atornilladas, conexiones de marcos arriostrados y requisitos de diseño.
description.ar: دليل شامل لوصلات الفولاذ الإنشائية. تعلم عن وصلات اللحظة المثبتة ووصلات الأطر المثبتة ومتطلبات التصميم.
description.fr: Guide complet des connexions d'acier structural. Apprenez les connexions à moment boulonnées, les connexions de cadres contreventés et les exigences de conception.
description.pt: Guia completo de conexões de aço estrutural. Aprenda sobre conexões de momento parafusadas, conexões de estruturas treliçadas e requisitos de projeto.
description.ru: Полное руководство по соединениям конструкционной стали. Узнайте о болтовых моментных соединениях, соединениях связевых каркасов и требованиях к проектированию.
description.ja: 鉄骨構造接続の完全ガイド。ボルト締結 момент 接合、ブレースフレーム接続、デザイン要件について学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Stahlkonstruktion Anschlüsse. Lernen Sie über geschraubte Momentverbindungen, ausgesteifte Rahmenverbindungen und Konstruktionsanforderungen.
description.hi: स्ट्रक्चरल स्टील कनेक्शन की पूर्ण गाइड। बोल्टेड मोमेंट कनेक्शन, ब्रेस्ड फ्रेम कनेक्शन, और स्टील स्ट्रक्चर के डिज़ाइन आवश्यकताओं के बारे में जानें।

keywords: structural steel connections, moment connections, braced frames, high strength bolts, A325 bolts, steel structure

body.en:
Structural steel connections fall into several categories:

1. Moment Connections:
- Transfer bending moment between members
- Column-beam connections
- Require full-depth end plates or angles
- Critical for frame stability

2. Shear Connections:
- Transfer only shear forces
- Simple beam-column connections
- Seat and clip angles
- Used in simply supported beams

3. Braced Frame Connections:
- Connect braces to frames
- Gusset plate connections
- Design for tension/compression in braces

4. Base Plates:
- Connect columns to foundations
- Anchor bolts transfer forces
- Design for compression, tension, shear

heading.en: High Strength Bolts for Structural Connections

body.en:
Structural connections require high-strength bolts:

ASTM Specifications:
- A325: High-strength bolts (120 ksi)
- A490: Higher strength (150 ksi)
- F1852: A325X (twist-off bolts)

Installation Methods:
1. Pretensioned (Turn-of-Nut):
- Snug tight then turn nut specified rotation
- Most common method

2. Direct Tension Indicator:
- Bolts with built-in indicators
- Compressible washer or spline

3. Alternative Design:
- Calibrated wrench method
- Twist-off bolts

Key design considerations:

1. Capacity:
- Shear capacity of bolts
- Bearing capacity of connected plates
- Net section rupture

2. Serviceability:
- Deflection limits
- Connection flexibility

3. Detailing:
- Clearances for erection
- Access for welding/bucking
- Corrosion protection
